repoDescription: Un motor de backend autónomo que escanea entornos de Google Cloud para detectar infraestructura ociosa (Cloud Waste) y genera automáticamente código IaC en Terraform para remediarlo, ahorrando miles de dólares.
demoTitle: Optimización de Costos en la Nube: Solución Autónoma para el Desperdicio de Recursos
summarySeed: Hola a todos, en este video les presento el FinOps Engine, un motor backend que desarrollé en Python para combatir el desperdicio de la nube en Google Cloud. Este motor no solo detecta recursos ociosos como discos huérfanos o IP reservadas, sino que también los remedia de forma autónoma. Durante la demo, configuré el entorno en modo simulación y mostré cómo el motor genera soluciones al instante, creando archivos estructurados listos para aplicar. Les invito a que un equipo de tvops o CRE realice un TransformApply para limpiar la infraestructura y lograr ahorros inmediatos, eliminando así el error humano.

demoTitle: Rebyt — AI-Validated Escrow Protocol | Aleph Hackathon 2026
summarySeed:
Rebyt lets money move based on real-world outcomes — not just transactions. AI validators evaluate whether conditions were met, and escrow settles automatically.

Tracks: GenLayer · BNB Chain · PL Genesis

Relevant Fields:
- Payments condicionados
- AI agents pagando cosas
- Sistemas donde la verdad es probabilística

"Blockchains execute transactions. Rebyt decides if they should happen."

summarySeed:
Treasury Pilot: AI-powered treasury evaluation for DAOs, built on GenLayer.

TreasuryPilot lets any DAO deploy its own Intelligent Contract with a custom constitution, including mission, councils, budgets, and evaluation rules. When proposals are submitted, GenLayer's AI validators independently evaluate them and reach consensus using Optimistic Democracy and the Equivalence Principle.

Built for the GenLayer Track @ Aleph Hackathon + GenLayer Hackathon 2026.

repoDescription: AI-Verified Freelance Escrow built on GenLayer.
demoTitle: VeriTask: AI-Verified Escrow & Reputation Protocol | GenLayer Aleph Hackathon
summarySeed:
Meet VeriTask, built for the GenLayer Aleph Hackathon.

Traditional freelance platforms suffer from slow, subjective, and centralized arbitration. VeriTask is a decentralized, two-sided escrow marketplace that replaces human middlemen with GenLayer Intelligent Contracts. By utilizing Optimistic Democracy and the Equivalence Principle, VeriTask programmatically evaluates off-chain web deliverables and releases funds only when a decentralized network of AI validator nodes reaches consensus.

 Key Power Features:
Immutable AI Reputation: An on-chain "AI Reliability Score" for every wallet based on GenLayer verification history.
Explainable AI: "Audit Reports" that show exactly why the validator nodes passed or failed a deliverable.
Enterprise UX: A fully persistent dual-sided dashboard with a seamless Light/Dark mode toggle.

Project Links:
Live App: https://veritask-pi.vercel.app/
GitHub Repo: https://github.com/Stella112/veritask

Tech Stack:
GenLayer Python SDK (gl.nondet.web, gl.eq_principle), React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Ethers.js. Architected by an AI Application Specialist to bridge the gap between high-end UX and bleeding-edge decentralized AI consensus.

repoDescription: Use this:  > Decentralized freelance escrow platform powered by GenLayer Intelligent Contracts. AI validators evaluate work submissions and autonomously release payment — no middlemen, no platform fees.
AI-powered merchant discovery for Buenos Aires
The first decentralized labor marketplace where AI agents autonomously hire, negotiate, and pay each other using the x402 protocol on Stacks/Bitcoin.
demoTitle: SYNERGI: The First Autonomous Agent Economy on Stacks (x402)
summarySeed:
Welcome to SYNERGI — a systemic Agent-to-Agent (A2A) economy where AI agents autonomously hire, negotiate, and pay each other using the x402 protocol on Stacks.

BUILT FOR: Stacks x402 Hackathon 2026

In this demo, we showcase:
1. **Recursive Hiring**: A Manager Agent breaking down a complex task and hiring specialized subagents (Research -Summarizer + Sentiment).
2. **x402 Micropayments**: Every interaction is settled instantly on-chain using STX or sBTC.
3. **Autonomous Valuation**: Agents evaluate each other's reputation and efficiency before hiring.
4. **Live Economy Graph**: Real-time visualization of the agent topology and payment flows.

Unlike simple chatbots, Synergi agents are sovereign economic actors. They earn crypto, manage their own wallets, and pay for the services they need to complete your goals.

TECH STACK:
- Blockchain: Stacks (Bitcoin L2)
- Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402 Payment Required)
- AI: Groq (Llama 3) + Google Gemini 2.0
- Frontend: Next.js 16 + React 19 (Canvas API)
- Backend: Express + TypeScript
